subcodes.first_line: The Book of Bahá unto him who hath believed in God, the Lord of Names, that He may make him steadfast in the Cause in such wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب البهاء الی من آمن بالله مالک الاسما لیجعله مستقیما علی الامر علی شان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
